title: Orites fiebrigii
taxonomy: Orites fiebrigii belongs to the family Proteaceae and is native to South America, specifically in the subtropical regions of Argentina and Uruguay. It is a shrub or small tree that is part of the genus Orites. The genus Orites is a group of flowering plants that are often referred to as the 'hakeas' of the southern hemisphere due to their similar characteristics. Orites fiebrigii is also known for its distinctive white flowers and grey-green foliage. The classification of Orites fiebrigii reflects its unique characteristics and its position within the broader plant kingdom.
